CustomField.formula: CASE( Owner_Division__c, 'ENT CSM - US','NA Ent/Strat', 'Global CSM - US', 'NA Ent/Strat', 'Global CSM - Investors', 'NA Ent/Strat', 'Inside CSM - US', 'NA Inside', 'Inside CSM - ROW', 'ROW', 'ENT CSM - Europe', 'Europe', 'Global CSM - Europe', 'Europe', 'ENT CSM - France', 'Europe', 'Global CSM - Agencies', 'Agency', 'Reseller - ANZ - Direct', 'ANZ Direct', 'Reseller - Japan', 'Japan Direct', null )
CustomField.label: ARR Bucket Region
